overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a grassy meadow and tree-lined path during a colorful sunset. The character encounters a horse rider passing by as the environment transitions from open field to enclosed woodland with deepening dusk lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass along a dirt path toward the setting sun

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
tall green grass with scattered wildflowers covering the ground
individual oak trees dotting the landscape on both sides
bright orange and pink sunset on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open meadow at sunset, following a narrow dirt path through tall grass. Scattered trees frame the sides while the sun sets directly ahead, casting a warm orange glow across the landscape.

events.description: entering tree corridor, sunlight filtering through branches creates dappled shadows

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt path flanked by dense trees on both sides

entered.detail: thick line of trees forming a corridor along the path
thin vertical column of smoke rising in the distant sky

segments.scene_description: The path enters a tree-lined corridor where dense foliage frames the trail. The sunset glow filters through the branches, and a distant smoke plume becomes visible on the right horizon as the open meadow gives way to woodland.

events.description: horse with rider approaches and passes by on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path as a mounted rider passes by

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse trotting past on the left side of the path, moving opposite to camera direction

entered.detail: large boulder visible beside the path as the horse passes

segments.scene_description: As dusk deepens, a horse rider passes by on the left, briefly sharing the trail before riding ahead. The sky darkens to purple and blue tones while the path continues through the increasingly shadowed forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched meadow that gradually transitions into a shadowed woodland at dusk. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path through tall grass, with the setting sun casting a warm orange glow directly ahead. As the path enters a tree-lined corridor, the open landscape gives way to dense foliage that filters the sunlight and reveals a distant plume of smoke on the horizon. The scene then shifts into deeper dusk, where the sky darkens to purple and blue tones as a horse rider passes by on the left. Finally, the camera continues forward through the increasingly shadowed forest as the light fades.
